books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.synopsis: Treasure Island is a classic adventure novel following young Jim Hawkins as he becomes entangled with pirates and the search for buried treasure. The story is filled with memorable characters, treacherous plots, and the quest for fortune on a mysterious island.

title.target: Dì yī zhāng: Zài Ā mǔ mó ěr Bēn bǎo
dì yī zhāng: hēi gǒu xiànshì yòu xiāoshī
